name: Queen's Edict
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Counter} Generation +[StateArg4]%. After playing a card, gain {Counter} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF, up to 2 times per turn. If the card played enters {Ultra Space}, the wielder also gains [StateArg2] Aliemus. After releasing Exalt, all enemies lose [StateArg3]% Temporary {STR} equal to the wielder's DEF.
